issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. Missing filter for {Red-Haired Pirates} type card, missing the 'look at 5 cards' mechanic, and missing the 'place rest at bottom' mechanic. Should use a more complex structure to represent: look at top 5 → reveal up to 1 Red-Haired Pirates (excluding card name) → add to hand → place others at bottom in any order.
Second effect with 'Trigger' trigger and DrawCard action is unexplained and does not match card text. This appears to be erroneous or placeholder logic.
Filter should specify type {Red-Haired Pirates} and exclude card name [Come On!! We'll Fight You!!], not 'Any'.
